mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market slack suppresses corporate wage costs and boosts profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 60% of months where UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, or the t-stat for return difference is insignificant at the 5% level.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP growth and rising consumer prices signals robust aggregate demand that outpaces inflationary drag, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in more than 55% of quarters, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month contractions in the index of industrial production indicate immediate supply-side bottlenecks that force corporate earnings downgrades, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 65% of contraction months, or the signal fails to predict direction during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect expanding economic activity and rising consumer spending capacity, which directly supports corporate revenues and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window, or payroll growth shows no predictive power for 20-day returns in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: When real personal consumption expenditures cross below 370,000 million dollars, weakening consumer demand forces corporate earnings revisions downward, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 60% of months below the threshold, or the signal loses predictive accuracy in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates combined with accelerating consumer price inflation signal a tightening monetary policy response that compresses equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields positive forward returns in more than 55% of months, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising industrial production and stagnant payroll growth indicates capital-intensive efficiency gains that boost profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in more than 60% of divergence months, or the signal fails during late-cycle phases in walk-forward tests.
